boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 explicitly states post-change email thread used instead of pre-change vendor master phone source

final_answer: ESCALATE. Policy STD-QUA-071-P requires pre-change callback source in the chain. CALL-QUA-071 confirms only post-change email thread was used, leaving one gate open. All other records align but boundary remains open.
